sys_app_requirement.acceptance_criteria: A student cannot submit a second booking in the same ISO week. A booking attempt when all 3 teachers are occupied for the selected slot is rejected with a clear error message.
sys_app_requirement.description: Enforce two booking constraints: (1) a student may book a maximum of one lesson per calendar week (ISO week), and (2) a selected time slot cannot be booked if all 3 teachers are already assigned to concurrent lessons at that time. Both constraints must be validated on the frontend and enforced via server-side Business Rules.
sys_app_requirement.name: REQ-003: Booking Constraints
